name: M1_02_PDF_Parser_Vision
description: Analysiert PDFs mit AI-Vision und extrahiert Text und Struktur

nodes.name: Idempotency Check
nodes.notes: Prevents duplicate processing if event is retried

nodes.name: New Processing?
nodes.notes: If no ID returned, step was already processed

nodes.name: Download PDF from Storage
nodes.notes: Fetches PDF from Supabase Storage using path from event payload

nodes.name: Prepare AI Fallback Request
nodes.notes: Prepares Base64 payload + prompt for MX_06_AI_Analyze_With_Fallback sub-workflow

nodes.name: Analyze Document (AI Fallback)
nodes.notes: Calls MX_06_AI_Analyze_With_Fallback sub-workflow with Claude → Gemini → GPT-4o fallback chain

nodes.name: AI Success?
nodes.notes: Checks if at least one AI model succeeded. If all 3 failed, workflow stops here (error logged in workflow_steps).

parameters.query:
-- Lookup client by email_domain, mit Fallback auf UNBEKANNT
SELECT 
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE email_domain = '{{ $json.email_domain }}' LIMIT 1),
    (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE last_name = 'UNBEKANNT' LIMIT 1)
  ) as id,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT last_name FROM clients WHERE email_domain = '{{ $json.email_domain }}' LIMIT 1),
    'UNBEKANNT'
  ) as client_name,
  CASE 
    WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM clients WHERE email_domain = '{{ $json.email_domain }}')
    THEN false
    ELSE true
  END as is_fallback;

INSERT INTO projects (
  name,
  client_id,
  object_street,
  object_zip,
  object_city,
  status,
  source,
  source_reference
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Prepare Project Data').item.json.project_data.name }}',
  {{ $json.id ? "'" + $json.id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $('Prepare Project Data').item.json.project_data.object_street }}',
  '{{ $('Prepare Project Data').item.json.project_data.object_zip }}',
  '{{ $('Prepare Project Data').item.json.project_data.object_city }}',
  'DRAFT',
  '{{ $('Prepare Project Data').item.json.project_data.source }}',
  '{{ $('Prepare Project Data').item.json.project_data.source_reference }}'
)
RETURNING id, project_number, name;

INSERT INTO project_files (project_id, folder_id, file_type, storage_path, file_name, mime_type)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Prepare for Upload').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  (SELECT id FROM project_folders WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Prepare for Upload').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid AND name = '01_Auftrag' LIMIT 1),
  'pdf',
  'projects/{{ $('Prepare for Upload').item.json.project_id }}/intake/auftrag.pdf',
  'auftrag.pdf',
  'application/pdf'
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Mark Processed + Emit Event
nodes.notes: Marks EMAIL_RECEIVED as processed, creates PENDING approval for Freigabecenter, emits PDF_PARSED, updates workflow_steps
